name: nightly-lint
description: Nightly 2am health check. Frontmatter, orphans, tag compliance, link rot, contradictions, duplicates, forward references. Reports but never edits.
prompt: Run vault-lint. Seven audit checks: frontmatter, orphans, tag compliance, link rot, contradictions, duplicates, forward references. Calculate health score. Write scorecard to wiki/journal/sync-logs/YYYY-MM-DD-lint.md. If health drops below 60, deliver chat notification.
